plugins.name: synchestra
plugins.description: Synchestra plugin: skills, commands, and hooks that teach AI agents how to use the synchestra CLI

plugins.name: specscore
plugins.description: SpecScore CLI plugin: skills that teach AI agents how to use the specscore CLI for spec navigation, linting, and lifecycle operations

plugins.name: specstudio
plugins.description: SpecStudio — AI skills for spec-driven development: specify, plan, build, verify, review, ship. Turns vague ideas into lint-clean SpecScore artifacts and gates implementation on approval.

plugins.name: ingitdb
plugins.description: inGitDB CLI plugin: skills that teach AI agents how to use the ingitdb CLI for Git-backed database operations — validate, list, describe, CRUD, and serve.

plugins.name: datatug
plugins.description: DataTug CLI plugin: skills that teach AI agents how to use the datatug CLI for data exploration, dataset management, schema scanning, and query execution.
